refusal_detection.text: I'm unable to share that information.
I'm not able to answer that.
The capital of France is Paris.
Chocolate can be toxic to dogs.
Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius at sea level.
The moon orbits the Earth roughly every 27 days.

numeric_contradiction.answer: The company's revenue was 50 million dollars.
numeric_contradiction.doc: In FY2023 our annual revenue was 12 million dollars.
Profit margin came in at 12 percent last year.

numeric_contradiction.answer: The drug reduced symptoms in 90 percent of patients.
numeric_contradiction.doc: The trial reported improvement in 45 percent of patients.

numeric_contradiction.answer: The moon takes about 27 days to orbit.
numeric_contradiction.doc: The moon takes 27.3 days to orbit the Earth.
The population of the city is roughly 8 million people.
